case_title: ALEXANDER JOSEPH KOLT VS. COLLABRA CONSULTING LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF KOLT, ALEXANDER JOSEPH AS TO DEFENDANT COLLABRA CONSULTING LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KOLT, ALEXANDER JOSEPH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COLLABRA CONSULTING LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY $85,303.59 PRINCIPAL, $457.37 INTEREST, $450.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $86,210.96, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
